steps.t: The picnic basket and blanket can both be found in Lyndelby. You should gather up the picnic items so that you can go on a picnic with Valaric Túcca.
An adequate picnic spot can be found in Lyndelby. You should journey to the picnic spot.
An adequate picnic spot can be found in Lyndelby. You should set down the picnic supplies.

Valaric Túcca can be found at the picnic spot in Lyndelby. You should talk to Valaric Túcca.
